title: Workflows Quarters category - scan project/user saved workflow scripts, read detail, remove saved files, export router targets

tests.cmd: npx vitest run tests/claude-workflows.test.ts tests/primitive-state.test.ts tests/quarters-crud.test.ts tests/quarters.test.ts
tests.summary: 18 passed - workflow scanner covers project .claude/workflows plus user workflows, ignores non-script files, de-dupes router targets with project precedence, reads script/body detail, deletes only the addressed file; primitive-state exposes workflow records with router targets; quarters dispatch reads/deletes workflows; category registry now includes Workflows.

e2e.cmd: GARRISON_E2E_PORT=3417 npx playwright test --project=desktop-chromium tests/e2e/quarters.spec.ts tests/e2e/quarters-crud.spec.ts
e2e.summary: 7 passed - Quarters index includes Workflows; workflow UI lists sandbox project/user workflows, opens read-only script detail, removes both saved workflow files, and shows the empty state.

video.note: This narrow follow-up is covered by committed unit tests and a re-runnable Playwright e2e. No new walkthrough video was recorded.

notes: Scope stayed within Quarters primitives: src/lib/claude-workflows.ts provides scan/detail/delete plus listWorkflowRouterTargets()/workflowToRouterTarget() using the router-compatible workflow target shape. Router, gateway/core, scheduler, improver, runner purge files, provider skills, and package dependencies were not edited.
